STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAVERNA, BRUCE TAVERNA, CRAIG AYRES, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LITTLEWODD FINANCIAL GROUP, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION LITTLEWOOD, DEAN H. $1,000,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000,000.00, 1. AS TO THE FIRST $100,000.00 OF THE JUDGMENT ONLY AT THE RATE OF 2% PER ANNUM BEGINNING ONE YEAR FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND EXECUTION STAY UNTIL MARCH 1, 2011. 2. AS TO THE 2ND $127,500.00 OF THIS JUDGMENT NO INTEREST SHALL BE PAYABLE AND EXECUTION STAY UNTIL MARCH 1, 2012. 3. AS TO THE $772,500.00 REMAINDER OF THE JUDGMENT PLTFS MAY NOT EXECUTE DIRECTLY AGAINST DEFTS BUT SHLL BE ENTITLED TO PURSUE EXECUTION AGAINST THE DEFTS' INSURANCE CARRIER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, THE TERMS OF THE TRO PROHIBITING DEFENDANT'S PERSONAL USE OF L L C FUNDS WILL BE INCORPORATED INTO A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION SUBJECT TO PLAINTIFFS POSTING AN UNDERTAKING IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,500.00. THE COURT WILL NOT INCLUDE THE OTHER REQUESTED TERMS IN THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS ADMONISHED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH C R C 3.1113 (D) AND (E). MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED PRELIMININARY INJUNCTION FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
